title: Which scenes conjure the most vivid emotions
display_title: Which scenes conjure the most vivid emotions
wikitext:
[]: Which scenes conjure the most vivid emotions?             Quote Post by zeaven » Thu Aug 24, 2006 5:31 am This has probably been posted somewhere before, sorry if it has. The following scenes get me every single time I rewatch eva: - Unit 03 gets thrashed by Unit 01. (18) - An aware Unit 01 howls upon ingesting the S^2 engine. (19) - Misato breaks down upon hearing Kaji's message. (21) - Asuka says "I've still got 12,000 plates of fortified armor! And I've got my AT field!" (25') - Asuka performs her "I'll kill you" mantra before being speared by the remaining MPs. (25') - Shinji talks with Yui in Instrumentality before bursting out of GNR's eye in Unit 01. (26') Every time. They just give me shivers. The one inspiring the most potent feelings is easily the one with Misato. I'm not sure why. Anyone else?

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Aug 24, 2006 5:37 am Rei's line "I am not your doll" and Asuka's mind rape scene...where the doll and little girl Asuka are like "Liar" The "Kill you all" thing and "I don't wanna die" things are pretty intesnse... nd my favorite...is in ep 26 with Shinji's "My life is worth existing"...that always gives me that funny warm feeling inside

[]:             Quote Post by Bardiel » Thu Aug 24, 2006 6:28 am -when Shinji almost kisses Asuka -Unit 01 breaking out of the sea of dirac and the resulting reaction with the characters watching. -unit 01 eating the S2 organ -unit 01 dicecting unit 03 -battle with Kaworu -Misato kissing Shinji -Shinji conversation with Gendo in episode 1

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Aug 24, 2006 6:45 am I'd say the duel with the 10th Angel. Three Eva Units allocated to where Misato's instuition wanted. That's one of the best fights I'd say.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 24, 2006 9:16 am This'll probably create a lot of crossover with this thread , but technically not the same thing.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Thu Aug 24, 2006 10:05 am - When Shinji staggers backwards into the Eva lift in horror as Misato smiles him on, then the doors slam shut and he ends up breaking down crying as the lift ascends. -The entire End of Instrumentality sequence with that beautiful piece of music, especially Rei's ghostly image staring at Eva-01. Those two are especially shivery moments.

[]:             Quote Post by zeaven » Thu Aug 24, 2006 3:04 pm the3rdchildren wrote: - When Shinji staggers backwards into the Eva lift in horror as Misato smiles him on, then the doors slam shut and he ends up breaking down crying as the lift ascends.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Thu Aug 24, 2006 7:57 pm heres a brain teaser for ya....the part where Shinji freaks out...

[]:             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Thu Aug 24, 2006 9:38 pm -When EVA-01 rips apart EVA-03 -Asuka's mind-rape -Asuka being eaten alive by the MP Evas -Misato's last speech to Shinji before she dies -Asuka repeating 'I don't want to die' X number of times (my favorite) -The whole Instrumentality process

[]:             Quote Post by Nukie » Thu Aug 24, 2006 11:21 pm Most of mine have already been said, but in episode 26: Shinji: Is it ok for me to bee here? *Silence* Shinji: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHH!!!

[]:             Quote Post by toReason » Fri Aug 25, 2006 1:32 am A few scenes definitely but one which springs to mind a lot is the one with Misato crying asking for her Shinji back, after he was absorbed in that 400% incident. Poor gal.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Fri Aug 25, 2006 4:07 am the part where Kawrou kills the kitten makes me sad....

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 25, 2006 11:10 am AuthenticM wrote: -Asuka being eaten alive by the MP Evas

[]:             Quote Post by Legend of the Past » Fri Aug 25, 2006 1:12 pm Like said before, Shogouki bursting out of GNR's eye. That scene, along with the music, sent shivers down my spine. I was like ' this is the greatest moment in EVA history!'

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:13 pm "Ohhhh hhhhhhh yeah!!!" </Ornette>

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:27 pm Reichu wrote: "Ohhhh hhhhhhh yeah!!!" </Ornette>

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:35 pm What that a sarcastic "hahaha"? You seriously warped my brain; now I can't watch Yui burst out of GNR's eye without hearing the Kool-Aid Man.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:41 pm Hm... -Kaji's last call to Misato, and her reaction. -Auska's encounter with the fifteenth Angel. -Rei's self-dustruction in 23'. -Rei's rejection of Gendo in EoE. -The really big explosion and GNR pulling out of the Earth's surface in EoE (ultimate "we're screwed now" moments for me).

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Aug 25, 2006 2:48 pm Reichu wrote: What that a sarcastic "hahaha"? You seriously warped my brain; now I can't watch Yui burst out of GNR's eye without hearing the Kool-Aid Man.

[]:             Quote Post by Kaysow » Sat Aug 26, 2006 8:20 am Many moments. I'm jaded as hell, but Evangelion is seriously powerful.
